access.label: Πολύ εύκολη πρόσβαση από λιμάνι/οικισμό
access.notes: Το AllOverGreece τοποθετεί την Αυλάκια στον μοναδικό οικισμό και λιμάνι της Ψερίμου και καταγράφει πολύ εύκολη πρόσβαση.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το AllOverGreece τεκμηριώνει ρηχά νερά στην παραλία Αυλάκια.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Nisyros/Pserimos low cleanup 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece supports Avlakia as the main Pserimos village/port beach, sandy, very easy to access, not organized, with nearby tavernas/shops and shallow water. The source wording about safety was not encoded; no live condition claim was encoded.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Pserimos records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain, depth and service context. Source safety/calm wording was not encoded. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

access.label: Μονοπάτι περίπου 30 λεπτών ή βάρκα
access.notes: Το AllOverGreece αναφέρει σηματοδοτημένο μονοπάτι περίπου 30 λεπτών από την περιοχή του λιμανιού ή πρόσβαση με σκάφος.

waterDepth.label: Μικτή αμμώδης και βοτσαλωτή ακτή
waterDepth.notes: Η πηγή τεκμηριώνει άμμο/χαλίκι και πρόσβαση, όχι αξιόπιστο ρηχό προφίλ.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Nisyros/Pserimos low cleanup 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece supports Vathy as a Pserimos beach reached by a marked path of about 30 minutes from the port area or by boat, with sand/gravel terrain and no organized setup. No wind, shelter, or live condition claim was encoded.

High-confidence Pserimos follow-up 2026-06-02: AllOverGreece, CavoBlue and other direct beach pages consistently support Vathy as an unorganized Pserimos beach reached by marked footpath from the port area or by boat, with sand/gravel terrain and no fixed services. External sheltered/calm wording was not imported. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

access.label: Μονοπάτι περίπου 45 λεπτών ή βάρκα
access.notes: Το AllOverGreece αναφέρει πρόσβαση με μονοπάτι μετά από περίπου 45 λεπτά πεζοπορίας ή με σκάφος.

waterDepth.label: Μικρή βοτσαλωτή ακτή
waterDepth.notes: Η πηγή τεκμηριώνει μικρές ακτές με ψιλό χαλίκι, όχι αξιόπιστο ρηχό προφίλ.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Nisyros/Pserimos low cleanup 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece supports Marathounda as a northern Pserimos beach with small fine-gravel beaches, no organized setup, and access by about 45 minutes of hiking or by boat. No live condition claim was encoded.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Pserimos records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain, depth and service context. Source safety/calm wording was not encoded. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
